history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing right. Immediately in front of me is lava, so I cannot move forward. I need to go down to reach the safe path. To face down, I should turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down. The cell directly in front of me at (2,1) is empty (`.`), so I can safely move forward. From there I plan to turn right and navigate around the lava to reach the goal at (3,3).
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column 1, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 3, column 3. A direct path is to go right along row 2 to column 3, then down to the goal. To face right from down, I need to turn left (counter-clockwise).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at position (2,1) facing right, and the goal is at (3,3). The cell directly in front of me at (2,2) is empty floor, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal. After that, I can continue to (2,3), then turn right to face down and move into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,2) facing right. The goal is at (3,3). Directly in front of me is an empty cell (2,3). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal while avoiding the lava at (3,2). After moving forward, I will need to turn to face down to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,3) facing right, and the goal is directly below me at (3,3). I cannot move forward because there is a wall ahead. I need to turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,3) facing down, and the goal is directly in front of me at (3,3). Moving forward will take me to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
